variant: give me the key stats on tretinoin results — numbers, not paragraphs

request.message: give me the key stats on tretinoin results — numbers, not paragraphs

response_body.response: dark circles specifically: tretinoin works on them by boosting collagen and thickening the under-eye skin, but the under-eye is fragile. most studies lump dark circles into broader photoaging, so isolated data is thin. expect 8–12 weeks to see real change there, assuming you're using it 3–4x per week to start and building tolerance. start low (0.025%), apply to dry skin, use a good moisturizer after.

products.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Lightweight ceramide + niacinamide moisturizer for nightly use.

cards.label: recommended starting dose
cards.hint: best balance of efficacy and tolerability
